result.summary: No verifiable public developer integration surface could be confirmed on lacework.com from accessible documentation pages; discovered docs endpoints rendered only a generic Fortinet document library shell without usable API/CLI/auth details.
result.description: Lacework, now presented as FortiCNAPP under Fortinet, is a cloud-native application protection and cloud security product. It is used to monitor, detect, and manage security risk across cloud environments.
